Return exactly one valid JSON array of quoted strings. Do not wrap it in Markdown. Do not include an explanation.

Candidates to reorder: ["Meridian Lab", "Northstar Cooperative", "Boreal Trust"]

The output array must contain exactly those 3 strings, once each, from highest priority to lowest priority. Copy the organization strings exactly. Do not omit candidates. Do not add placeholder organizations. A one-item or two-item array is invalid; always output all 3 candidate strings.

Use only the evidence below. If the options are close, use practical fit as a tie-breaker.
